name: components/card
description: A flexible container that groups related content and actions into a distinct visual unit. Provides a complete composition system with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, and CardFooter. Supports custom border-radius via theme, responsive header layouts with action slots, and clean separation of header, body, and footer regions.
useCases: Dashboard metric cards combining a title, value, trend indicator, and footer context
Product or user profile cards with header image, description, and action buttons
Settings or form panels wrapped in a card for visual grouping on complex pages
Authentication forms (login, register, forgot-password) using CardHeader and CardFooter
usage: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/card"
